description: Educated but non-specialist viewers who are curious about the world and comfortable with documentary content. They bring no domain expertise but are capable of engaging with complex ideas when explained clearly.

demographic_signals.typical_prior_exposure: casual — aware the subject may exist but has not studied it

engagement_triggers: clear visual context — maps, timelines, comparative images
feeling of learning something most people do not know

script_guidance.outro_cta_style: soft suggestion — embed the next video idea naturally in the final question or observation
